description: This file is a shell script used for automating the deployment of project documentation to the 'gh-pages' branch. It builds documentation, manages git branches, moves files appropriately, and handles special directories related to documentation versions.

methods.name: print_success
methods.description: Prints a success message in green color.

methods.name: print_error
methods.description: Prints an error message in red color and exits.

methods.name: print_info
methods.description: Prints an informational message in blue color.

methods.name: print_warning
methods.description: Prints a warning message in yellow color.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes a given command with pre- and post-message handling and error checking.
